---
name: IEP proposal
about: Propose a change to the normative IaP specification (chapters, schemas, conformance)
labels: iep
---

> All normative specification changes go through the IaP Enhancement Proposal process. This issue starts the **Idea** stage; if there is interest, the next step is a Draft IEP authored from [spec/ieps/IEP-TEMPLATE.md](../../spec/ieps/IEP-TEMPLATE.md) and submitted under `spec/ieps/`. Process and lifecycle: [spec/ieps/README.md](../../spec/ieps/README.md).

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what should change in the specification, and why. -->

## Problem statement

<!-- What the current specification cannot express, gets wrong, or leaves ambiguous. Cite chapters/sections. -->

## Scope of impact

- [ ] Schema (`spec/schema/`)
- [ ] Normative prose (`spec/chapters/`)
- [ ] Conformance suite (`spec/conformance/`)
- [ ] Runtime model / implementations
- [ ] Provider mappings

## Compatibility

<!-- Is this additive (minor-release eligible) or breaking (major-only, needs a migration transform)? See spec/chapters/10-versioning.md. -->

## Willing to author the IEP?

<!-- Yes/No. If yes, the maintainer will assign an IEP number. -->
